summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustLens relationship intelligence platform. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI 95% working. All major features operational including AI-powered analysis, pulse checking, deep analysis wizard, mirror mode, and conversation coach.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with TrustLens logo and hero content
Navigation to Clarity Moment page with emotional checkpoint
Relationship Pulse 3-slider quick check with stability hearts display
Deep Analysis baseline step with duration dropdown, satisfaction sliders, communication textarea
All 13 backend API endpoints (start analysis, submit pulse, baseline, changes, timeline, questions, answers, mirror mode, conversation coach, results)
AI integration with Claude Sonnet 4.5 for adaptive questioning and conversation guidance
Session management and data persistence through MongoDB
Mobile responsive design with menu toggle
Form interactions and UI element functionality
Trust Disruption Index calculations and stability heart indicators
Mirror Mode and Conversation Coach page accessibility
